description: Cloudflare WAF custom rules for AhmedETAP Platform. Deploy via Cloudflare Dashboard → Security → WAF → Custom Rules, or via API.

rules.name: Block SQL Injection
rules.description: Block SQL injection attempts in query parameters and POST body.
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "union select") or (http.request.uri.query contains "' or '1'='1") or (http.request.uri.query contains "drop table") or (http.request.uri.query contains "insert into") or (http.request.body contains "union select")

rules.name: Block XSS Attempts
rules.description: Block Cross-Site Scripting attempts in query parameters.
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "<script") or (http.request.uri.query contains "javascript:") or (http.request.uri.query contains "onerror=") or (http.request.uri.query contains "<iframe")

rules.name: Block Malicious User Agents
rules.description: Block known attack tools (sqlmap, nikto, nmap, etc.).
rules.expression: (http.user_agent contains "sqlmap") or (http.user_agent contains "nikto") or (http.user_agent contains "nmap") or (http.user_agent contains "masscan") or (http.user_agent contains "dirb") or (http.user_agent contains "gobuster") or (http.user_agent contains "wpscan") or (http.user_agent contains "hydra") or (http.user_agent contains "burp") or (http.user_agent contains "acunetix") or (http.user_agent contains "nessus") or (http.user_agent contains "zgrab")

rules.name: Rate Limit Auth Endpoints
rules.description: Limit auth endpoints to 10 requests/minute per IP to prevent credential stuffing.

rules.name: Rate Limit API
rules.description: General API rate limit: 300 requests/minute per IP.

rules.name: Block SSRF Patterns
rules.description: Block requests containing internal IP addresses or cloud metadata endpoints.
rules.expression: (http.request.body contains "169.254.169.254") or (http.request.body contains "localhost") or (http.request.body contains "127.0.0.1") or (http.request.body contains "metadata.google.internal") or (http.request.uri.query contains "169.254.169.254")

rules.name: Block HTTP Method Override
rules.description: Block requests that try to override HTTP method via headers.

rules.name: Challenge Suspicious Bots
rules.description: Issue a JavaScript challenge to suspicious bots (Bot Score 1-29).

rules.name: Block Confirmed Bots
rules.description: Block confirmed bots (Bot Score >= 30) on API endpoints.

rules.name: Block Non-HTTPS
rules.description: Redirect all HTTP requests to HTTPS.

rules.name: Block Direct Origin Access
rules.description: Block requests that arrive with the HF Space hostname in the Host header (bypassing Cloudflare).
